title: Endurance Requirements
description: Define minimum endurance requirements for weeks-to-months aloft including energy reserve and structural limits

title: Station-Keeping Requirements
description: Define station-keeping accuracy requirements including wind field envelope geofence radius and position hold tolerance

title: Energy Balance Requirements
description: Define solar harvest vs. load balance requirements including day/night energy margin and degradation budget

title: Payload Budget Requirements
description: Define mass power and thermal envelope allocations for comms EO and ISR payloads

title: Altitude Selection Requirements
description: Define operating altitude band and performance requirements for the 18–22 km stratospheric operating envelope

title: Regulatory Requirements
description: Define regulatory compliance requirements including ICAO gap type certificate path and ITU spectrum coordination

title: Structural Life Requirements
description: Define structural fatigue life UV degradation tolerance and thermal cycling endurance requirements

title: Launch and Recovery Requirements
description: Define launch and recovery envelope requirements including transit configuration ground handling and logistics

title: Data Architecture Requirements
description: Define downlink bandwidth latency budget and data architecture requirements for comms and mission data
